confidence_rationale: Video is classified as instructional/marketing material. It is a product overview and demonstration video for the MediSimu laparoscopy simulator platform, not a scored performance of an FLS task by a trainee or surgeon. The video contains product showcase, equipment displays, training session footage, and marketing information, but no actual task performance assessment to score.
cannot_determine: No individual task performance to assess
No penalties applicable to marketing/instructional content
No skill level ranking for product demonstration
technique_summary: This is a product demonstration and marketing video for the MediSimu laparoscopy simulator system. It showcases multiple FLS task modules (peg transfer, endosuturing, endoloop, knot-tying) and trainer configurations, but does not contain a scored performance by a single trainee on a specific FLS task. The video includes equipment overview, group training sessions, and promotional content.

demonstrated_techniques: Endosuturing pad with multiple suture placements
Endoloop task setup with foam appendage
Complete FLS simulator configuration and layout
verbal_cues: Includes all you need to start practice
